form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and proved too slick around Horsham over 410m in 23.42, claiming a Grade 5 by one length. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed strong early pace and proved too slick around Horsham over 410m in 23.42, claiming a Grade 5 by one length. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 2 over 450m at Warrnambool behind Paw Raynor beaten 4.5 lengths (25.60). Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 2 over 450m at Warrnambool behind Paw Raynor beaten 4.5 lengths (25.60). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Warragul over 400m (22.53) beating Mr. Kia Ora in Special conditions Veteran race on March 31. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with him.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing last on April 3 over 400m at Geelong in a Grade 5. Hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (34.84) over 600m at The Meadows. Drawn awkwardly. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 9 at this track over 450m. Last start was fourth over 390m in 22.21, behind Foxy Jay. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a 4.5 lengths third over 450m Ballarat in 25.33. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Latest effort finished last in a Free For All on March 28 over 525m at The Meadows behind Paw Matic beaten 10 lengths (30.70). Expect improvement on the latest effort. Great chance to atone.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Horsham to win by 1.75 lengths in 23.40, beating Black Statesman. Last start finished 6th over 435m at Sale beaten 7 lengths (25.03) behind Minter Scorch in a Grade 4 on March 29. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.
